articles.title: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
articles.description: US Central Command says it has struck missile and drone storage facilities and coastal radar positions.

articles.title: Home Office to introduce new asylum routes to UK
articles.description: The home secretary said "capped safe and legal" routes would help to restore confidence in the asylum system.

articles.title: Hottest June day record broken for third day in row as temperature hits 37.3C
articles.description: Suffolk saw the highest temperature on Friday - but many will feel the heatwave begin to ease over the weekend.

articles.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as families desperate for news
articles.description: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as international rescue teams start to arrive.
